# Research: ui-polish-animation-spec

*Auto-generated by AIDLC research phase*

**Question:** Design a UI animation and transition specification for mallcore-sim. Review all 28 UI panel scripts in game/scenes/ui/ and define: (1) panel open/close transitions (slide, fade, scale — pick one consistent pattern), (2) feedback animations needed (sale confirmation, money change, reputation change, milestone unlock, item placement), (3) tooltip appearance behavior, (4) day summary screen transitions, (5) build mode entry/exit visual feedback. Keep it simple — Godot Tween-based, no complex animation trees. Define timing curves and durations. The game uses a CanvasLayer UI approach.

---

The file write was denied. Here's the complete UI Animation & Transition Specification:

---

# UI Animation & Transition Specification

## Design Philosophy

All animations use Godot's `Tween` system via the existing `PanelAnimator` static utility class (`game/scripts/ui/panel_animator.gd`). No AnimationPlayer or AnimationTree nodes. Every animation must feel snappy — players open/close panels constantly; animations provide spatial context and feedback, never delay interaction.

---

## 1. Timing & Easing Reference

Existing `PanelAnimator` constants plus new ones:

| Constant | Value | Used For |
|---|---|---|
| `SLIDE_DURATION` | `0.2s` | Side panel open/close (exists) |
| `MODAL_DURATION` | `0.15s` | Modal/dialog open/close (exists) |
| `TOOLTIP_FADE_DURATION` | `0.15s` | Tooltip appear/disappear (exists) |
| `TOOLTIP_HOVER_DELAY` | `0.3s` | Delay before tooltip shows (exists) |
| `MODAL_SCALE_START` | `0.95` | Modal scale-up start value (exists) |
| `FEEDBACK_FLOAT_DURATION` | `0.8s` | Floating text rise + fade (new) |
| `FEEDBACK_PULSE_DURATION` | `0.3s` | HUD value pulse effect (new) |
| `FEEDBACK_SHAKE_DURATION` | `0.2s` | Error/invalid shake (new) |
| `BANNER_SLIDE_DURATION` | `0.3s` | Milestone banner slide-in (new) |
| `BANNER_HOLD_DURATION` | `3.0s` | How long banner stays visible (new) |
| `BUILD_MODE_TRANSITION` | `0.25s` | Build mode overlay fade (new) |

**Easing rules (no exceptions):**
- **Opening/appearing**: `EASE_OUT` + `TRANS_CUBIC` — fast start, gentle settle
- **Closing/disappearing**: `EASE_IN` + `TRANS_CUBIC` — gentle start, fast exit
- **Elastic/bounce effects**: Never. Keep it professional and fast.

---

## 2. Panel Open/Close Transitions

Every panel falls into one of three animation categories based on its role.

### Category A: Side Panels (Slide)

Tooling/browsable list panels that slide in from screen edge, overlaying the game world.

**Animation**: `PanelAnimator.slide_open` / `PanelAnimator.slide_close`

| Panel | Slides From | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `InventoryPanel` | Left | Already implemented |
| `PricingPanel` | Left | Already implemented |
| `OrderPanel` | Left | Needs animation added |
| `StaffPanel` | Right | Needs animation added |
| `TrendsPanel` | Right | Needs animation added |
| `MilestonesPanel` | Right | Needs animation added |
| `FixtureCatalog` | Right | Needs animation added |
| `FixtureUpgradePanel` | Right | Needs animation added |

**Left vs Right convention**: Store operations (inventory, pricing, ordering) slide from left. Meta/management panels (staff, milestones, trends, build mode) slide from right. Spatial mental model: left = hands-on store work, right = oversight.

**Implementation pattern** for panels lacking animation:

```gdscript
var _anim_tween: Tween
var _rest_x: float
var _panel: Control

func _ready() -> void:
    _panel = $Panel
    _rest_x = _panel.position.x
    _panel.visible = false

func open() -> void:
    if _panel.visible:
        return
    PanelAnimator.kill_tween(_anim_tween)
    _anim_tween = PanelAnimator.slide_open(_panel, _rest_x, _from_left)
    EventBus.panel_opened.emit(_panel_name)

func close() -> void:
    if not _panel.visible:
        return
    PanelAnimator.kill_tween(_anim_tween)
    _anim_tween = PanelAnimator.slide_close(_panel, _rest_x, _from_left)
    EventBus.panel_closed.emit(_panel_name)
```

### Category B: Modal Panels (Scale + Fade)

Focus-demanding panels that block game interaction. Scale 0.95→1.0 with simultaneous fade-in.

**Animation**: `PanelAnimator.modal_open` / `PanelAnimator.modal_close`

| Panel | Notes |
|---|---|
| `CheckoutPanel` | Already implemented |
| `DaySummary` | Already implemented |
| `HagglePanel` | Needs animation added |
| `TradePanel` | Needs animation added |
| `SaveLoadPanel` | Needs animation added |
| `SettingsPanel` | Needs animation added |
| `AuthenticationDialog` | Needs animation added |
| `RefurbishmentDialog` | Needs animation added |
| `PackOpeningPanel` | Needs animation added |

**Implementation pattern**:

```gdscript
var _anim_tween: Tween

func open() -> void:
    PanelAnimator.kill_tween(_anim_tween)
    _anim_tween = PanelAnimator.modal_open(_panel)

func close() -> void:
    PanelAnimator.kill_tween(_anim_tween)
    _anim_tween = PanelAnimator.modal_close(_panel)
    _anim_tween.finished.connect(_on_close_finished, CONNECT_ONE_SHOT)
```

### Category C: Full-Screen Overlays (Fade)

| Panel | Duration | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `PauseMenu` | 0.15s | Fade overlay + menu simultaneously (currently instant — add fade) |
| `EndingScreen` | Staggered | Already has staggered fade — keep as-is |
| `MainMenu` | N/A | No transition needed (entry point) |
| `TutorialOverlay` | 0.3s | Already implemented |

---

## 3. Feedback Animations

Non-panel animations triggered by EventBus signals. Never block player input.

### 3a. Sale Confirmation (Floating Text)

**Partially implemented** in `visual_feedback.gd`. Standardize:

**Trigger**: `EventBus.item_sold`

1. Spawn Label at sale location (or HUD cash area)
2. Text: `"+$XX.XX"` in `POSITIVE_COLOR` (#66CC59)
3. Tween over 0.8s: Y offset -40px upward, alpha fade in final 40%
4. Queue-free on completion

```gdscript
static func spawn_floating_text(parent: Node, text: String, color: Color,
        start_pos: Vector2, duration: float = FEEDBACK_FLOAT_DURATION) -> void:
    var label: Label = Label.new()
    label.text = text
    label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", color)
    label.position = start_pos
    label.z_index = 100
    parent.add_child(label)
    var tween: Tween = label.create_tween()
    tween.set_parallel(true)
    tween.tween_property(label, "position:y", start_pos.y - 40.0, duration)\
        .set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_CUBIC)
    tween.tween_property(label, "modulate:a", 0.0, duration * 0.4)\
        .set_delay(duration * 0.6)
    tween.set_parallel(false)
    tween.tween_callback(label.queue_free)
```

### 3b. Money Change (HUD Pulse)

**Partially implemented** in `hud.gd`. Standardize:

**Trigger**: `EventBus.money_changed`

- Increase: scale 1.0→1.15→1.0 over 0.3s, flash `POSITIVE_COLOR` then back
- Decrease: scale 1.0→1.1→1.0 over 0.3s, flash `NEGATIVE_COLOR` then back
- Scale easing: `EASE_OUT` + `TRANS_BACK` (slight overshoot feels punchy)

```gdscript
func _pulse_cash_label(increase: bool) -> void:
    var color: Color = UIThemeConstants.POSITIVE_COLOR if increase \
        else UIThemeConstants.NEGATIVE_COLOR
    var scale_target: float = 1.15 if increase else 1.1
    _cash_label.pivot_offset = _cash_label.size / 2.0
    PanelAnimator.kill_tween(_cash_tween)
    _cash_tween = _cash_label.create_tween()
    _cash_tween.set_parallel(true)
    _cash_tween.tween_property(_cash_label, "scale",
        Vector2(scale_target, scale_target), FEEDBACK_PULSE_DURATION * 0.4)\
        .set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_BACK)
    _cash_tween.tween_property(_cash_label, "theme_override_colors/font_color",
        color, FEEDBACK_PULSE_DURATION * 0.3)
    _cash_tween.set_parallel(false)
    _cash_tween.tween_property(_cash_label, "scale",
        Vector2.ONE, FEEDBACK_PULSE_DURATION * 0.6)\
        .set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_CUBIC)
    _cash_tween.tween_property(_cash_label, "theme_override_colors/font_color",
        UIThemeConstants.BODY_FONT_COLOR, FEEDBACK_PULSE_DURATION * 0.3)
```

### 3c. Reputation Change (HUD Flash + Arrow)

**Trigger**: `EventBus.reputation_changed`

- Increase: flash `POSITIVE_COLOR` + append "▲" for 1.0s
- Decrease: flash `NEGATIVE_COLOR` + append "▼" for 1.0s
- Color returns to default over 0.4s after the hold

```gdscript
func _flash_reputation_label(old_value: float, new_value: float) -> void:
    var increased: bool = new_value > old_value
    var color: Color = UIThemeConstants.POSITIVE_COLOR if increased \
        else UIThemeConstants.NEGATIVE_COLOR
    var arrow: String = " ▲" if increased else " ▼"
    _reputation_label.text = _format_reputation(new_value) + arrow
    PanelAnimator.kill_tween(_rep_tween)
    _rep_tween = _reputation_label.create_tween()
    _rep_tween.tween_property(_reputation_label,
        "theme_override_colors/font_color", color, 0.1)
    _rep_tween.tween_interval(1.0)
    _rep_tween.tween_callback(func() -> void:
        _reputation_label.text = _format_reputation(new_value))
    _rep_tween.tween_property(_reputation_label,
        "theme_override_colors/font_color",
        UIThemeConstants.BODY_FONT_COLOR, 0.4)
```

### 3d. Milestone Unlock (Banner)

**Already implemented** in `milestone_popup.gd`. Standardize timing:

1. Slide down from top: Y `-banner_height` → `target_y` over 0.3s, `EASE_OUT` + `TRANS_CUBIC`
2. Hold 3.0s
3. Slide back up + fade alpha to 0 over 0.3s, `EASE_IN` + `TRANS_CUBIC`
4. Queue next milestone if any. Keep existing queue system.

### 3e. Item Placement Feedback

**Trigger**: `EventBus.fixture_placed` (success) / `EventBus.fixture_placement_invalid` (failure)

- **Success**: Scale punch 1.0→1.08→1.0 over 0.2s, `EASE_OUT` + `TRANS_BACK`
- **Failure**: Horizontal shake (3 oscillations, 6px magnitude, 0.2s) + red tint flash

```gdscript
static func shake(node: Control, duration: float = FEEDBACK_SHAKE_DURATION,
        magnitude: float = 6.0) -> Tween:
    var original_x: float = node.position.x
    var tween: Tween = node.create_tween()
    var step: float = duration / 7.0
    for i: int in range(3):
        tween.tween_property(node, "position:x", original_x + magnitude, step)
        tween.tween_property(node, "position:x", original_x - magnitude, step)
    tween.tween_property(node, "position:x", original_x, step)
    return tween
```

### 3f. Haggle/Trade Result Flash

- **Accepted**: Green flash on panel background (modulate green-tinted then back), 0.2s
- **Declined**: Red flash + shake, 0.2s

---

## 4. Tooltip Behavior

Foundation exists via `PanelAnimator.fade_in` (0.15s). Full lifecycle:

### Hover-to-Show Sequence

1. Mouse enters item → start `TOOLTIP_HOVER_DELAY` (0.3s) timer
2. Mouse leaves before timer → cancel
3. Timer fires → position near cursor (+12px right/down, clamped to viewport)
4. `PanelAnimator.fade_in` over 0.15s
5. While visible, tooltip follows cursor in `_process` (no tween)
6. Mouse leaves → fade out 0.15s, then hide

### Positioning

```gdscript
static func position_tooltip(tooltip: Control, mouse_pos: Vector2,
        viewport_size: Vector2) -> void:
    var offset: Vector2 = Vector2(12.0, 12.0)
    var pos: Vector2 = mouse_pos + offset
    if pos.x + tooltip.size.x > viewport_size.x:
        pos.x = mouse_pos.x - tooltip.size.x - offset.x
    if pos.y + tooltip.size.y > viewport_size.y:
        pos.y = mouse_pos.y - tooltip.size.y - offset.y
    tooltip.position = pos
```

### Instant Dismissal (no fade) when:
- Any `EventBus.panel_opened` fires
- Player clicks anywhere
- Player presses Escape

---

## 5. Day Summary Screen Transitions

Already uses `PanelAnimator.modal_open/close`. Enhance with staggered content:

### Open Sequence
1. Dark overlay: alpha 0→0.6 over 0.2s
2. Panel `modal_open`: 0.15s, starts 0.05s after overlay
3. Stat rows: stagger fade-in with 0.05s delay each
4. Continue button: fades in 0.2s after last stat

```gdscript
func _stagger_stats(stat_rows: Array[Control]) -> void:
    for i: int in range(stat_rows.size()):
        var row: Control = stat_rows[i]
        row.modulate = Color.TRANSPARENT
        var tween: Tween = row.create_tween()
        tween.tween_interval(0.05 * i)
        tween.tween_property(row, "modulate", Color.WHITE, 0.15)\
            .set_ease(Tween.EASE_OUT).set_trans(Tween.TRANS_CUBIC)
```

### Close Sequence
1. Panel `modal_close` (0.15s)
2. Overlay fades out (0.15s, parallel)
3. Emit `continue_pressed`, resume game

### Stat Highlights
- **Record high**: `POSITIVE_COLOR` + gentle pulse (1.0→1.05→1.0)
- **Record low**: `NEGATIVE_COLOR`
- **Normal**: default `BODY_FONT_COLOR`

---

## 6. Build Mode Entry/Exit

### Entry (on `EventBus.build_mode_entered`)
1. HUD dim: modulate alpha 1.0→0.5 over 0.25s
2. Grid overlay fade-in: alpha 0→1 over 0.25s (parallel with HUD dim)
3. Fixture catalog: `slide_open` from right, 0.2s, starts 0.1s after grid
4. World tint: tween to `Color(0.85, 0.88, 0.95, 1.0)` over 0.25s

### Exit (on `EventBus.build_mode_exited`)
1. Fixture catalog: `slide_close`
2. All parallel: HUD alpha→1.0, grid alpha→0.0, world tint→`Color.WHITE` over 0.25s
3. Fixture upgrade panel (if open): `slide_close` immediately

### Fixture Selection
- Selected button: scale pulse 1.0→1.05→1.0, 0.15s
- Previous selection: instant reset (no animation)

---

## 7. PanelAnimator Extensions

New static methods to add to `game/scripts/ui/panel_animator.gd`:

| Method | Signature | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `shake` | `(node: Control, duration: float, magnitude: float) -> Tween` | Horizontal shake for errors |
| `pulse_scale` | `(node: Control, target_scale: float, duration: float) -> Tween` | Scale punch for success/attention |
| `flash_color` | `(node: Control, color: Color, duration: float) -> Tween` | Flash modulate to color and back |
| `fade_out` | `(panel: Control, duration: float) -> Tween` | Counterpart to existing `fade_in` |
| `stagger_fade_in` | `(nodes: Array[Control], per_delay: float, fade_duration: float) -> Tween` | Sequential fade for lists/stats |

New constants: `FEEDBACK_FLOAT_DURATION`, `FEEDBACK_PULSE_DURATION`, `FEEDBACK_SHAKE_DURATION`, `BANNER_SLIDE_DURATION`, `BANNER_HOLD_DURATION`, `BUILD_MODE_TRANSITION`

---

## 8. Implementation Priority

| Priority | Task | Files | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| **P0** | Modal animations for HagglePanel, TradePanel | 2 files | Small |
| **P0** | Slide animations for OrderPanel, StaffPanel | 2 files | Small |
| **P1** | Standardize money pulse in HUD | `hud.gd` | Small |
| **P1** | Reputation flash + arrow in HUD | `hud.gd` | Small |
| **P1** | Day summary stat stagger + highlights | `day_summary.gd` | Medium |
| **P1** | Modal for SaveLoadPanel, SettingsPanel | 2 files | Small |
| **P2** | Build mode entry/exit transitions | 3 files | Medium |
| **P2** | Slide for MilestonesPanel, TrendsPanel, FixtureCatalog, FixtureUpgradePanel | 4 files | Small each |
| **P2** | New PanelAnimator methods | `panel_animator.gd` | Medium |
| **P2** | Placement success/failure feedback | placement scripts | Medium |
| **P3** | PauseMenu fade | `pause_menu.gd` | Small |
| **P3** | Modal for AuthenticationDialog, RefurbishmentDialog, PackOpeningPanel | 3 files | Small each |
| **P3** | Haggle/Trade result flash | 2 files | Small |

---

## 9. Anti-Patterns to Avoid

- **No animation chaining that blocks input** — kill current tween and start close immediately
- **No duplicate tweens** — always `PanelAnimator.kill_tween()` before creating new
- **No animation on already-visible panels** — guard with visibility checks
- **No long animations** — nothing exceeds 0.8s; most are 0.15-0.3s
- **No scale on CanvasLayer** — animate the inner Control child
- **No modulate on parents with animated children** — multiplies unexpectedly
- **No `await` in animation code** — use `tween_callback` and `finished` signal

---

## 10. Testing Checklist

For each panel receiving animation:

- [ ] Opens with correct animation
- [ ] Closes with correct animation
- [ ] Rapid open/close doesn't break state (tween killed properly)
- [ ] Responds to Escape during animation
- [ ] Responds to `panel_opened` mutual-exclusion during animation
- [ ] No visual artifacts when opened before previous close completes
- [ ] Works at all game speeds (tweens use real time, not game time)
